name: io.github.mshegolev/sonarqube-mcp
description: SonarQube MCP — projects, metrics, quality gate, issues, worst-metric ranking.

environmentVariables.name: SONARQUBE_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: SonarQube authentication token (Bearer). Generate in: My Account → Security → Tokens.

environmentVariables.name: SONARQUBE_SSL_VERIFY
environmentVariables.description: Verify SSL certificates (true/false). Set to 'false' for self-signed certs.
